name: @supermajia/majia-guanyuan
description: Tool-agnostic Agent Skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Six capabilities + philosophy doc — Part A data query & card creation / Part B ETL governance & write (incl. SmartETL full-chain rewrite + ExecPlan) / Part C custom chart HTML+CSS+JS injection / Part C-12 HTML application-style dashboard / Part D V7 Page/Card publish pipeline + mobile phoneLayout ZIP-inject / Part E SuperApp open-app development pipeline / **NEW philosophy-layer doc — AI-native ADS design (V2.1.13)**: when client says ‘want to add AI to existing BI’, judge ‘governance vs rebuild’; ODS/DIM/DWD untouched, ADS rebuilt for LLM-native consumption; 7 field constraints (Chinese enums / pre-computed recommendations / composite semantics pre-joined / TIMESTAMP / strict-value priorities / pre-computed numerics / row-level permission redundancy); budget allocation 30% governance + 30% ADS rebuild + 40% AI apps. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes (gbrain). V2.1.14 (2026-05-29) — command surface aligned with @guandata/guancli 1.0.29 (ds execute-sql / metric project / server-version / card preview --dynamic-field + --dynamic-param). V2.1.13 (2026-05-22) — NEW references/ai-native-ads-design.md (~340 lines, 9 sections) distilled from user's root judgment after v2.1.12 SuperApp demo: «light governance is dead, must rebuild ADS in AI-native shape». V2.1.12 (2026-05-22) — NEW references/part-e-superapp-pipeline.md (~620 lines, 18 sections) distilled from building a working SuperApp demo on workshop513 in one day. V2.1.11 (2026-05-22) docs-only — Step 5.5 HARD GATE landing (version history ≤ 3 entries, svg alt synced); V2.1.10 (2026-05-21): NEW §16 mobile phoneLayout complete guide (~330 lines) — v7 BI has NO callable draft save REST API (8 endpoints all stub/404), the only working path is `guanvis-skill pack` → Python inject phoneLayout into `page.meta` JSON string → `guanvis-skill upload` via transfer API directly overwrites published page; phoneLayout five-field structure with selector `group_AUTO_PHONE` container, mobileHeightUnit:60, customChart h=40 ≈ 572px; CSS @media 768px KPI 4→2 col + `html,body { height:auto }` to unlock iOS scroll. V2.1.9: NEW §15 customChart three traps + autoBootstrap + chip toolbar fallback. V2.1.8: NEW §14 SmartETL node-level GROUP_BY STRING COUNT_DISTINCT silently swapped to NUL + JOIN_DATA only honors predicates[0] + FULL_OUTER silently downgraded. V2.1.7: routing/triggering refresh. V2.1.6: NEW references/v7-page-card-publish-pipeline.md — 12 pitfalls from end-to-end demo. V2.1.5: NEW references/restaurant-bi-formulas/ — fully-anonymized restaurant-chain BI formula playbook (10 markdown files, 2881 lines, 60+ SQL snippets + 6 ETL engineering patterns + 39 production ETL catalog index). V2.1.4: command surface synced with @guandata/guancli 1.0.21. V2.1.1: HTML application-style dashboard generation (Part C-12). V2.1.0: @guandata/guanvis-skill@0.1.13 internal-Nexus rollout. V2.0.0: renamed from guanyuan-majia. V1.5.0: progressive-disclosure architecture saves ~1.2万 tokens per invocation.
author: maojiebc
